testcase.name: test_02_login_ceo

failure.message: AssertionError: CEO login failed assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_employee_lifecycle.py:59: in test_02_login_ceo assert result, "CEO login failed" E AssertionError: CEO login failed E assert False

testcase.name: test_13_toggle_lead_assignment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_employee_lifecycle.py:379: in test_13_toggle_lead_assignment assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to toggle leads: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to toggle leads: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_14_get_employee_payslips
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_employee_lifecycle.py:404: in test_14_get_employee_payslips assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get payslips: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get payslips: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
